task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B7-sarcasm-classification
Title: B7. Sarcasm Classification

Question:
Classify three Reddit replies as sarcastic (0) or non-sarcastic (1).
Determine the 3-bit pattern.

Grading target:
Exact match on the 3-bit string.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt: I cannot complete the sarcasm classification because the three Reddit replies to be analyzed were not provided in the input. Please provide the text of the replies.

grading.extracted_answer: I cannot complete the sarcasm classification because the three Reddit replies to be analyzed were not provided in the input. Please provide the text of the replies.
grading.grading_notes: No simple v1 grader is defined for this question yet.

review.overall_summary: The model correctly identified that the input was incomplete. The task required classifying three Reddit replies, but the replies themselves were not provided in the prompt. Consequently, the model could not perform the classification and reported the missing information.
what_worked: The model accurately identified the missing context (the Reddit replies) required to solve the task.
The model did not hallucinate an answer despite the missing data.
where_it_failed: The task could not be completed due to insufficient input data.
variable_observations: The orchestration policy 'agent_decides' led the model to 'report_problem' because the necessary data was absent.
The 'context_policy' is set to 'minimal', which may contribute to missing data if the data is expected to be retrieved from an external source or a larger context window not provided here.

recommendations.suggested_change: Ensure that the Reddit replies are included in the question text or provided via the context window.
recommendations.reason: The model cannot perform classification tasks if the subject matter is missing from the prompt.
